name: Red Flannel Hash (Homemade Corned Beef Hash)
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 oz) diced beets, drained OR 1 cup cooked diced beets
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and dice potatoes into 1/2 inch cubes.
2. Place the diced potatoes in a 4 cup glass measure.
3. Add water to the measure.
4. Cover with plastic wrap, leaving the vent area uncovered.
5. Microwave on high for 6 to 7 minutes. Set aside.
6. In a 2 qt casserole, place onion and bacon drippings.
7. Cover with lid or plastic wrap.
8. Microwave on high for 2 to 3 minutes, or until onion is tender.
9. Stir in potatoes, corned beef, beets, milk, and parsley.
10. Add salt and pepper to taste.
11. Microwave on high for 3 minutes, or to desired temperature.
12. If desired, the mixture may be browned in a skillet on conventional range top instead of final reheating in microwave.
Makes 4 servings.
